sglang.title: Add support for new autogptq quant_config.checkpoint_format
sglang.author: Qubitium
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Reason for PR: make sure loading of gptq marlin quants is compatible with latest autogptq
Due to autogpq update AutoGPTQ/AutoGPTQ#603 quants made with autogptq >=0.8.0-dev will use a new checkpoint_format property to hold marlin and future formats.
Compat tested with both marlin and non-marlin in bo

vllm.title: [Model] Add support for Qwen2MoeModel
vllm.author: wenyujin333
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Recently, the new codes of Qwen2MoE to Hugging Face Transformers, and thus I would love to contribute the new model to vLLM as well.
In this PR, I have provided the implementation of Qwen2MoE model and add some notes on it.

vllm.title: [2/N] Chunked prefill data update
vllm.author: rkooo567
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
It is the second PR to enable chunked prefill.
This PR introduces prefill's start and end indexes and API to access them. Also add metadata to SequenceGroupMetadata to indicate if the seq_group is in chunked prefill stage.
Ideally, this mechanism should be unified to computed_num_blocks approach, bu

vllm.title: [Kernel] Add MoE Triton kernel configs for A100 40GB
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Added the MoE Triton kernel configs targeting A100-40GB GPUs, for Mixtral with TP=4,8 and DBRX with TP=8. Requested by AWS.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Set enable_prefix_caching=True in prefix caching example
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: I believe we should explicitly set enable_prefix_caching=True to enable prefix caching. I found that the prefix kernel was unused otherwise. Please correct me if I'm wrong.

vllm.title: fix logging msg for block manager
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Showing
INFO 03-28 21:39:58 block_manager_v1.py:239] disable automatic prefix caching

Is not good UX. the message for feature flags should be informative.

vllm.title: [Core] fix del of communicator
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: dist module might have been already destroyed, add a check for better cleanup.

vllm.title: [Benchmark] Change mii to use persistent deployment and support tensor parallel
vllm.author: IKACE
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Description
When running benchmarks/benchmark/benchmark_throughput.py using deepspeed-mii backend, the original code uses non-persistent pipeline deployment, which does not support tensor parallelism and will generate errors when tp > 1.
Solution
Change deepspeed-mii backend to use persistent deploy

vllm.title: Revert "bump version to v0.4.0"
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Reverts #3705 until the actual release is created.

vllm.title: [Test] Make model tests run again and remove --forked from pytest
vllm.author: rkooo567
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR makes model_tests work by

Right now, some tests fail because fork is called after cuda context is initialized. This is due to the usage of --forked #3557. The reason why --forked is required is to clean up resources by simply killling processes. This PR removes the usage of --forked from py

vllm.title: [Core][Test] move local_rank to the last arg with default value to keep api compatible
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
#3686 makes usage of local_rank , but the API change is breaking. This PR modifies the API to be backward compatible, and add test for the local_rank argument.
This is kind of smoke test, as we only test the multi-node code in single node. But that should be fine, because single-node program is also

vllm.title: add ccache to docker build image
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt: this is now available after CMake changes. it should cut down CI time for building images from 10 minutes to <1 minutes without kernel changes.

vllm.title: Usage Stats Collection
vllm.author: yhu422
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Issue: #1376
Added usage_lib.py: Collect information such as GPU type, vllm version, cloud provider upon engine initialization. The info is written to a local file and sent to server. The collection can be disabled through setting environment variables or config file.
Added arguments to from_engine_
